mapper.insert: insert into mo_task_material(task_id, data_no, serial_number, back_no, tr_entry_date, seq_no, order_code, order_no, box_count, entry_target_box_count, publish_date, cust_mat_no, maker_mat_no, cust_mat_name, cust_back_no, cust_snp, cust_qr_image, cust_wc, cust_place_pos, cust_box_type, line_name, batch_no, cust_name,cust_color_code, kd_no, entry_place_no, entry_date, tip_no, entry_time, out_date, tray_no, memo, create_by, create_time) values(#{taskId},#{dataNo},#{serialNumber},#{backNo},#{trEntryDate}, #{seqNo},#{orderCode},#{orderNo},#{boxCount},#{entryTargetBoxCount},#{publishDate}, #{custMatNo},#{makerMatNo},#{custMatName},#{custBackNo},#{custSnp},#{custQrImage}, #{custWc},#{custPlacePos},#{custBoxType},#{lineName},#{batchNo},#{custName},#{custColorCode}, #{kdNo},#{entryPlaceNo},#{entryDate},#{tipNo},#{entryTime},#{outDate},#{trayNo},#{memo}, #{createBy},NOW())

insert into mo_task_material(task_id, data_no, serial_number, back_no, tr_entry_date, seq_no, order_code, order_no, box_count, entry_target_box_count, publish_date, cust_mat_no, maker_mat_no, cust_mat_name, cust_back_no, cust_snp, cust_qr_image, cust_wc, cust_place_pos, cust_box_type, line_name, batch_no, cust_name,cust_color_code, kd_no, entry_place_no, entry_date, tip_no, entry_time, out_date, tray_no,memo, create_by, create_time) values
(#{t.taskId}, #{t.dataNo},#{t.serialNumber},#{t.backNo},#{t.trEntryDate}, #{t.seqNo}, #{t.orderCode},#{t.orderNo},#{t.boxCount},#{t.entryTargetBoxCount}, #{t.publishDate}, #{t.custMatNo},#{t.makerMatNo},#{t.custMatName},#{t.custBackNo}, #{t.custSnp}, #{t.custQrImage},#{t.custWc},#{t.custPlacePos},#{t.custBoxType}, #{t.lineName}, #{t.batchNo},#{t.custName},#{t.custColorCode},#{t.kdNo}, #{t.entryPlaceNo}, #{t.entryDate},#{t.tipNo},#{t.entryTime},#{t.outDate},#{t.trayNo}, #{t.memo}, #{t.createBy},NOW())
mapper.select:
select a.*, b.maker_mat_no as maker_mat_no1, b.cust_mat_no as cust_mat_no1, b.cust_color_code as cust_color_code1, b.order_no as order_no1, b.part_name, b.back_no as back_no1 from mo_task_material a left join mo_material_bom b on a.maker_mat_no=b.maker_mat_no and a.cust_mat_no=b.cust_mat_no and a.cust_color_code=b.cust_color_code
AND
a.task_id = #{item.taskId} and a.data_no = #{item.dataNo}
order by a.data_no asc

select a.*, b.maker_mat_no as maker_mat_no1, b.cust_mat_no as cust_mat_no1, b.cust_color_code as cust_color_code1, b.order_no as order_no1, b.part_name, b.back_no as back_no1 from mo_task_material a left join mo_material_bom b on a.maker_mat_no=b.maker_mat_no and a.cust_mat_no=b.cust_mat_no and a.cust_color_code=b.cust_color_code where a.task_id = #{taskId} order by a.data_no asc
